title: Weavster artifact manifest
description: The CLI↔engine contract. Produced by `weavster compile`, consumed by the engine. Lists the enabled pipelines with inline connector config and the flow→wasm map. See docs/ARTIFACT_SPEC.md.

manifestVersion.description: Schema version of this manifest file. The engine refuses an unknown value. Decoupled from the project apiVersion.

abiVersion.description: Host ABI the wasm modules were built against (the Javy stdin/stdout contract). The engine refuses a module it cannot drive.

pipelines.description: The enabled pipelines, in declaration order. Disabled pipelines are excluded at compile time.

flow.description: Flow name; resolves by convention to flows/<flow>.wasm.

source.description: Where documents come from. `file` is the only connector this phase; the source `format` selects the parser inside the wasm.

glob.description: Glob resolved against the connector root; each match yields one document.

sink.description: Where documents go. `file` is the only connector this phase; the sink `format` selects the serializer inside the wasm.

path.description: Path written relative to the connector root.
